groups.summary: GitHub 在 Copilot cloud agent 上同时上线 runner controls、organization firewall、signed commits 与 Copilot SDK，社区热帖强调企业级治理。

items.title: GitHub Copilot cloud agent 组织级治理
items.subject: GitHub 组织管理员
items.event_summary: organization-level runner controls + firewall controls enforce network/access policies for Copilot cloud agent.
items.why_it_matters: Enterprise governance is now guaranteed by product defaults, easing compliance.
items.notes: Hacker News discussion highlights reduction in unauthorized runs.

items.title: Copilot cloud agent signed commits
items.subject: Copilot cloud agent
items.event_summary: Agent outputs now automatically sign commits, linking to compliance logs.
items.why_it_matters: Allows automated output to enter existing audit workflows.
items.notes: Reddit thread called this the missing link for enterprise adoption.

groups.summary: Copilot SDK public preview packages runtime/tooling/permissions; community commentary frames it as an enterprise foundation.

items.title: Copilot SDK public preview
items.subject: GitHub Copilot SDK
items.event_summary: Public preview adds streaming, BYOK, tool integrations, telemetry interfaces.
items.why_it_matters: Turns AI coding into embeddable infrastructure.

items.title: GPT-5.4 mini enters Copilot Student
items.subject: GitHub Copilot
items.event_summary: GitHub depreciates GPT-5.1 Codex series and routes Copilot Student to GPT-5.4 mini.
items.why_it_matters: Model lifecycle managed by platform, raising migration work for developers.
items.notes: Reddit thread worries about compatibility testing load.

groups.summary: OpenAI and Sam Altman narrative pushes governance/budget urgency, while community notes UI changes for GPT-5.3 routing.

items.title: OpenAI Help Center updates GPT-5.3 defaults
items.subject: OpenAI
items.event_summary: Reframes GPT-5.3 as default, with GPT-5.2 Thinking as auto routing for deeper tasks.
items.why_it_matters: Model experience now determined by routing logic rather than manual selection.
items.notes: Reddit users observed UI tweaks aligning with doc updates.

items.title: Sam Altman pushes governance + action timeline
items.subject: Sam Altman
items.event_summary: Advocates CEOs make AI decisions in 6-12 months, adding governance and budget to the message.
items.why_it_matters: Signals AI adoption steps are moving into core operating agendas.
items.notes: Lex Fridman podcast echoes similar governance themes (see show notes).
